steps.title: Identify the input and output
steps.content: In function notation, $K(36)=4{,}536$ means the input is $36$ and the output is $4{,}536$.

steps.title: Interpret the units
steps.content: The input to $K(v)$ is speed in meters per second, and the output is kinetic energy in joules. So an object traveling at $36$ meters per second has a kinetic energy of $4{,}536$ joules. The answer is A.
